creator: petef@databits.net
text:
- update to version 2.1.2
- add python to CATEGORIES
- RUN_DEPENDS= python... -> USE_PYTHON
- replace patch-aa with a regexp
- ^I^I -> ^I
- install getmailrc-example in ${PREFIX}/share/examples/getmail instead of
  ${PREFIX}/share/getmail
- use ${DATADIR}
- install documentation
- make pkg-descr better
